title: Resolve curvature-accounting condition: C10: H_curv rescue dependency
description: Sector: H_curv / correction tensor dependency. Allowed condition: H_curv remains non-insertable until tensor definition, source side, divergence safety, and mass neutrality are derived. Forbidden condition: H_curv is introduced as curvature rescue, M_ext correction, boundary counterterm, or Bianchi paint. Consequence: correction tensors cannot be inserted from curvature accounting language..
